empty.title: Your learning journey starts here
empty.description: Create your first path and start collecting YouTube videos into a focused, distraction-free flow.

path.publicLabel: Public — anyone with the link can view
path.privateLabel: Private — only you can see this

deleteDialog.title: Delete learning path
deleteDialog.description: This will permanently delete {{title}} and all its videos. This cannot be undone.

empty.title: No videos yet
empty.description: Add your first YouTube video and start building this learning path.

notFound.title: Path not found
notFound.description: This link may be invalid or the path is no longer public.

authDialog.title: Sign in to clone
authDialog.description: You need an account to save this path. Your chosen name is already saved — just sign in or create an account and we'll clone it automatically.

empty.title: Nothing here yet
empty.description: The author hasn't added any videos to this path yet.

video.dragToReorder: Drag to reorder · Click to open
video.dashOnlyMessage: This video can only be played after downloading. Download it now to watch offline.
video.localFileError: Could not play the local file. Try removing and re-downloading the video.

error.bot_detection: YouTube blocked the request. Try again later.
error.geo_blocked: This video is not available in your region.
error.members_only: This video is for channel members only.
error.unavailable: This video is unavailable or private.
error.format_unavailable: No downloadable format found for this video.
error.unknown: Download failed for an unknown reason.
